title: TNT Drops Every 15 Seconds
description: Every 15 seconds, a primed TNT spawns above each player. Pure chaos, pure fun.
body:
Survive if you can.
This datapack makes Minecraft 10x more chaotic by spawning a primed TNT above every player every 15 seconds. The TNT has a normal fuse, behaves like regular TNT, and deals full damage.

Perfect for:

YouTube challenges

SMP punishment systems

Insane speedruns

Trolling your friends

Hardcore chaos series

✨ Features

TNT spawns every 15 seconds per player

Normal explosion timing — no instant boom

Full player + block damage

Lightweight, zero lag, server friendly

Works in singleplayer + multiplayer


📥 How to Install

Download the .zip

Drop it into world/datapacks/

/reload

Enjoy the chaos 😈
